questionHtml: By considering the product of all the roots of the equation, find the value of α.
markschemeHtml:
product of roots =80                          (A1)

3-i is a root                          (A1)

attempt to set up an equation involving the product of their four roots and ±80                          (M1)

3+i3-iα3=80⇒10α3=80

α=2                          A1

 

[4 marks]
